title: Insurance Underwriter
description: Travelers is seeking an Insurance Underwriter for our Phoenix office to evaluate commercial insurance applications, assess risk, and make underwriting decisions. You will review policy applications, order inspections and reports, and communicate underwriting decisions to brokers and customers.
responsibilities: Review commercial insurance applications and identify required documentation
Order property inspections, loss control assessments, and third-party reports
Analyze risk factors and make underwriting decisions per guidelines
Negotiate terms and conditions with brokers and risk managers
Communicate underwriting decisions and rationale clearly
Maintain accurate records and track performance metrics

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, Insurance, or related field
certifications: Arizona insurance license preferred or in-progress

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance
Licensing fee reimbursement and professional development
